title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Byju's International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Byju's International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Byju's International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Byju's International Enterprises:
Byju's International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's International Enterprises!
